language.help: This preference is stored locally for the current browser or desktop client.

errors.anilistRateLimited: AniList rate limit reached. Please try again later.

common.includeInAnimeLibraryHelp: Add non-downloaded shows that are in your currently watching list to the anime library.
common.savedAutomaticallyAfterRestart: Settings are saved automatically and applied after a restart

app.latestVersion: You are running the latest version

mediastream.description: Manage transcoding and direct play settings

colorScheme.title: Color scheme
colorScheme.disableLivePreviewHelp: Disabling will reload the page without applying the changes.
colorScheme.enableBlurringEffectsHelp: May impact performance on some devices.

backgroundImage.title: Background image
backgroundImage.help: Background image for all pages. Dimmed on non-library screens.

customCss.descriptionLine1: The custom CSS will be saved on the server and needs to be applied manually to each client.
customCss.descriptionLine2: In case of an error rendering the UI unusable, you can always remove it from local storage using the devtools.

navigation.expandSidebarOnHoverHelp: Causes visual glitches with plugin tray.

media.watchContinuityWarning: Watch continuity needs to be enabled to use the last watched sorting options.
media.customBannerHelp: Use the banner image on all library screens.

default.label: Default
default.description: Always show a banner image. If not available, the cover image will be used instead.

blur-when-unavailable.label: Blur when unavailable
blur-when-unavailable.description: Show the banner image if available. If not available, the cover image will be used and blurred.

dim-when-unavailable.label: Dim if unavailable
dim-when-unavailable.description: Show the banner image if available. If not available, the banner will be dimmed.

hide-when-unavailable.label: Hide if unavailable
hide-when-unavailable.description: Show the banner image if available. If not available, the banner will be hidden.

default.label: Large
default.description: Fill a large portion of the screen.

small.label: Smaller
small.description: Use a smaller banner size, displaying more of the image.

library.libraryDirectoryHelp: Path of the directory where your media files are located. Keep the casing consistent.
library.additionalLibraryDirectoriesHelp: Include additional directory paths if your library is spread across multiple locations.
library.automaticallyRefreshLibraryMoreHelp: When adding batches, not all files are guaranteed to be picked up.
library.scannerConfigurationDescription: Configure advanced scanner rules in JSON format. This allows you to define custom matching and hydration rules for your library.
library.useLegacyMatchingAlgorithmHelp: Enable to use the legacy matching algorithms. Versions 3.4 and below.
library.useLegacyMatchingAlgorithmMoreHelp: The legacy matching algorithm uses simpler methods which may be less accurate.
library.matchingAlgorithmHelp: Choose the algorithm used to match files to AniList entries.
library.matchingThresholdHelp: The minimum score required for a file to be matched to an AniList entry. Default is 0.5.

onlineStreaming.enableHelp: Watch anime episodes from online sources.

torrentProvider.defaultProviderHelp: Used by the search engine. Select 'None' if you don't need torrent support.

torrentClient.tagsHelp: Comma separated tags to apply to downloaded torrents. e.g. seanime,anime
torrentClient.categoryHelp: Category to apply to downloaded torrents.
torrentClient.showActiveTorrentCountHelp: Show the number of active torrents in the sidebar. Memory intensive.

server.aniListApiCacheWarningLine1: The AniList API is not working. All requests will be served from the cache.
server.aniListApiCacheWarningLine2: You can disable this in the app settings.
server.automaticallyUpdateProgressHelp: If enabled, your progress will be automatically updated when you watch 80% of an episode.
server.desktopAndIntegratedPlayersOnly: Only applies to desktop and integrated players.
server.enableWatchHistoryHelp: If enabled, Seanime will remember your watch progress and resume from where you left off.
server.hideAudienceScoreHelp: If enabled, the audience score will be hidden until you decide to view it.
server.enableAdultContentHelp: If disabled, adult content will be hidden from search results and your library.
server.blurAdultContentHelp: If enabled, adult content will be blurred.
server.localDataDescription: Local data is used when you're not using an AniList account.
server.autoBackupListsFromAniListHelp: If enabled, your local lists will be periodically updated by using your AniList data.
server.offlineModeDescription: Only available when authenticated with AniList.
server.downloadMetadataAutomaticallyForOfflineU: Download metadata automatically for offline use
If disabled, you will need to manually refresh your local metadata by clicking 'Sync now' in the offline mode page.
Will be paused if you have made changes offline and have not synced them to AniList yet.
server.saveCurrentMediaOffline: Save all currently watched/read media for offline use
server.saveCurrentMediaOfflineHelp: If enabled, Seanime will automatically save all media you're currently watching or reading for offline use.
server.openLocalhostWebUrlOnStartup: Open localhost web URL on startup
server.disableSystemNotificationsMoreHelp: Notifications shown by the OS when Seanime runs the auto-downloader or auto-scanner.
server.disableAniListCachingHelp: If enabled, Seanime will stop caching AniList requests to disk.
server.disableAniListCachingMoreHelp: By default, all requests made to AniList are cached. This allows Seanime to keep being usable when AniList goes down. The cache directory is modifiable in the config file.
server.useCacheOnlyModeHelp: Seanime will use cached data instead of making API requests.
server.useFallbackMetadataProviderHelp: If enabled, Seanime will use an alternative source to fetch episode metadata.
server.doNotCheckForUpdatesHelp: If enabled, Seanime will not check for new releases.
server.doNotFetchUpdateNotesHelp: If enabled, new releases won't be displayed. Seanime Denshi may still auto-update in the background.
server.doNotFetchUpdateNotesMoreHelp: You cannot disable auto-updates for Seanime Denshi.
server.updateChannelHelp: Also applies to Seanime Denshi auto-updates.
server.usingSeanimeReleaseChannel: You are currently using a release channel hosted on Seanime.
server.usingSeanimeCanaryReleaseChannel: You are currently using the canary release channel hosted on Seanime. This channel may receive unstable updates without much testing.

localAccount.autoSyncFromAniListHelp: Periodically update your local collection by using your AniList data.

manga.enableHelp: Read manga series, download chapters and track your progress.
manga.defaultProviderHelp: Provider selected by default when opening a new manga series.
manga.overwriteAllSourcesDescription: This will overwrite the selected source of all manga series you've opened with the default provider. Are you sure you want to proceed?
manga.autoUpdateProgressHelp: If enabled, your progress will be automatically updated when you reach the end of a chapter.
manga.localProviderDescription: Read manga series from your local directory.
manga.localSourceDirectoryHelp: Directory where your manga is stored. This is only used by the local manga provider.

debrid.autoDownloaderNotUsingDebridDescription: Auto Downloader is enabled but not using Debrid. Change the <0>Auto Downloader settings</0> to use your Debrid service.
debrid.autoSelectHelp: Let Seanime find the best torrent automatically, based on cache and resolution.
debrid.preferredResolutionHelp: If auto-select is enabled, Seanime will try to find torrents with this resolution.

torrentStreaming.autoSelectHelp: Let Seanime find the best torrent automatically.
torrentStreaming.preferredResolutionHelp: If auto-select is enabled, Seanime will try to find torrents with this resolution.
torrentStreaming.torrentClientHostHelp: Leave empty for default. The host to listen for new uTP and TCP BitTorrent connections.
torrentStreaming.torrentClientPortHelp: Leave empty for default. Default is 43213.
torrentStreaming.slowSeedingHelp: This can help avoid issues with your network.
torrentStreaming.streamUrlAddressHelp: Modify the stream URL formatting. Leave empty for default.
torrentStreaming.cacheDirectoryHelp: Where the torrents will be downloaded to while streaming. Leave empty to use the default cache directory.

mediastream.preferTranscodingHelp: If enabled, Seanime will not automatically switch to direct play if the media codec is supported by the client.
mediastream.directPlayOnlyHelp: Only allow direct play. Transcoding will never be started.
mediastream.hardwareAccelerationHelp: Hardware acceleration is highly recommended for a smoother transcoding experience.
mediastream.customSettingsHelp: Video stream only, scaleFilter = -vf, -map, -bufsize, -b:v, and -maxrate are applied automatically.
mediastream.transcodePresetHelp: 'Fast' is recommended. VAAPI does not support presets.
mediastream.ffmpegPathHelp: Path to the FFmpeg binary. Leave empty if the binary is already in your PATH.
mediastream.ffprobePathHelp: Path to the FFprobe binary. Leave empty if the binary is already in your PATH.

mediaPlayer.defaultPlayerHelp: Player that will be used to open files and track your progress automatically.
mediaPlayer.iinaAlert: <0>For IINA to work correctly with Seanime, make sure <1>Quit after all windows are closed</1> is <2>checked</2> and <3>Keep window open after playback finishes</3> is <4>unchecked</4> in your IINA general settings.</0>
mediaPlayer.automaticallyPlayNextEpisodeHelp: If enabled, Seanime will play the next episode after a delay when the current episode is completed.
mediaPlayer.leaveEmptyToUseCli: Leave empty to use the CLI.

externalPlayerLink.encodeFilePathInUrl: Encode file path in URL (library only)
externalPlayerLink.encodeFilePathInUrlHelp: If enabled, the file path will be base64 encoded in the URL to avoid issues with special characters.

playback.noExternalPlayerScheme: No external player custom scheme has been set
playback.useBuiltInPlayerHelp: When enabled, all media playback will use the built-in player and override the settings below.
playback.downloadedMediaDescription: Choose how to play anime files stored on your device
playback.desktopMediaPlayerDescription: Opens files in your system player with automatic tracking
playback.externalPlayerLinkDescription: Send stream URL to another application
playback.torrentAndDebridStreamingDescription: Choose how to play streamed content from torrents and debrid services
playback.desktopMediaPlayerStreamsDescription: Opens streams in your system player with automatic tracking

denshi.minimizeToTrayOnCloseHelp: When enabled, closing the window will minimize the app to the system tray instead of quitting.
denshi.openInBackgroundHelp: When enabled, the app will start hidden. You can show it from the system tray.
denshi.openAtLaunchHelp: When enabled, the app will start automatically when you log in to your computer.
denshi.openAtLaunchLinuxUnsupported: This feature is not supported on Linux.

discord.description: Show what you are watching or reading in Discord.
discord.showAniListProfileButtonHelp: Show a button to open your profile page on AniList.

logs.cpuProfilingHelp: CPU profiling will run for the specified duration (1-300 seconds)

data.importWarning: This will overwrite your existing library data. Make sure you have a backup.
data.dataFilePathHelp: The path to the JSON file containing the local file data.

nakama.usernameHelp: The username to identify this server to other instances. If empty, a random ID will be assigned.
nakama.reminderDescription: Add a password to your config file before exposing your server to the internet.
nakama.hostModeDescription: Host mode is intended for Seanime servers that are accessible over the internet.
nakama.cloudRoomsSuffix: to host watch parties without exposing your server to the internet.
nakama.enableHostModeHelp: If enabled, this server will act as a host for other clients. This requires a host password to be set.
nakama.hostPasscodeHelp: Set a passcode to secure your host mode and room. This passcode should be different from your server password.
nakama.shareLocalAnimeLibraryHelp: If enabled, this server will share its local anime library with other clients.
nakama.excludeAnimeFromSharingHelp: Select anime that you don't want to share with other clients.
nakama.cannotConnectWhileHosting: Cannot connect to a host while in host mode.
nakama.serverUrlHelp: The URL of the Nakama host to connect to.
nakama.remotePasscodeHelp: The passcode to connect to the Nakama host.
nakama.useSharedAnimeLibraryHelp: If enabled, Nakama's anime library will be used as your library if it is being shared.

autoSelect.providersHelp: Select up to 3 providers in order of priority
autoSelect.releaseGroupsHelp: Preferred groups in order of priority
autoSelect.resolutionsHelp: Preferred resolutions in order of priority
autoSelect.preferredCodecsHelp: Ordered list of preferred codecs (comma-separated alternatives)
autoSelect.preferredSourcesHelp: Ordered list of preferred sources (comma-separated alternatives)
autoSelect.requireLanguageMatchHelp: Reject if no preferred language is found
autoSelect.requireCodecMatchHelp: Reject if no preferred codec is found
autoSelect.requireSourceMatchHelp: Reject if no preferred source is found

dialogs.defaultDescription: Are you sure you want to continue?

auth.signOutDescription: Are you sure you want to sign out?
auth.usingAniListRecommended: Using an AniList account is recommended.

settings.lightThemeUnsupported: Seanime does not support light themes

settings.mangaSourcesRestored: Previous source selections have been restored.

scanner.title: Library Scanner
scanner.guestWarning: Using this feature without an AniList account is not recommended if you have a large library, as it may lead to rate limits and slower scanning. Please consider using an account for a better experience.

options.myAniListCollectionOnlyHelp: This is faster but generally less accurate if your collection does not contain all anime in the library.
options.myAniListCollectionOnlyActiveHelp: Matches local files against your AniList collection.
options.offlineDatabaseHelp: Matches local files against the entire AniList catalog. Scanning will be slower.
options.aniListApiHelp: <0>Slower for large libraries</0>. Seanime will send an API request for each anime title found in the library, which may lead to rate limits and slower scanning.

status.notInAniListCollection: Anime is not present in your AniList collection

dialogs.manualMatchConfirmDescription: Are you sure you want to match this manga to the search result?
dialogs.reloadSourcesDescription: This action will empty the cache for this manga and fetch the latest data from the selected source.
dialogs.removeOfflineDataDescription: This action will remove the offline data for this media entry. Are you sure you want to proceed?

downloads.allowPopups: Seanime will open a new tab for each file you download. Make sure your browser allows popups.

episodes.notDownloaded: You have not downloaded the following:

metadata.aniDbEpisodeHelp: Specials typically contain the letter S
metadata.episodeMetadataUnavailable: Episode metadata retrieval not available for this entry.
metadata.episodeNumberHelp: Relative episode number. If movie, episode number = 1
metadata.inaccurateScheduleDescription: Please check the schedule online for more information.
metadata.inaccurateScheduleTitle: Could not retrieve accurate scheduling information for this show.
metadata.metadataParentDescription: Add metadata to specials by linking the entry to a parent anime.
metadata.metadataParentHelp: This will not work if the parent series does not contain specials metadata.

states.clientFilterErrorDescription: Could not load chapter filters. Please contact the extension developer: "{{error}}"
states.invalidEpisodes: Some episodes are invalid. Update the metadata to fix this.

descriptions.gan-3x-large: Generative adversarial network for perceptual quality
descriptions.mode-c: Upscales with denoising then upscales again

errors.loadingStream: An error occurred while loading the stream: {{message}}
errors.playbackFallback: An error occurred while playing the stream. Please try again later.

subtitles.convertSoftSubsToAssHelp: The player will convert other subtitle formats (SRT, VTT, ...) to ASS. In case your language is not supported, you can add a new font or disable this feature. Reloading the player is required after changing this setting.
subtitles.ignoredSubtitleNamesHelp: Subtitle tracks that will not be selected by default if they match the preferred languages. Separate multiple names with commas.

translation.deepLNote: Note: DeepL does not support all target languages.
translation.enableTranslationHelp: Automatically translate subtitle tracks to your selected language
translation.reloadRequired: Reloading the player is required only when switching languages or API Key.
translation.targetLanguageHelp: Select the language you want subtitles to be translated to

settings.anime4kHelp: High-quality upscaling filters. Higher modes may reduce playback performance.
settings.captionStylesHelp: Customize native captions rendered by the browser.
settings.customFontDescriptionAfter: and restart the player to use it.
settings.fileNameHelp: The file name inside the Seanime assets directory.
settings.subtitleDelayHelp: Positive values delay subtitles. Negative values show subtitles earlier.

subtitles.dragDropHelp: You can add subtitles by dragging and dropping files onto the player.

toasts.castConnectFailed: Failed to connect to Chromecast device: {{message}}
toasts.hlsUnsupported: HLS playback not supported on this browser
toasts.playingStreamError: An error occurred while playing the stream: {{message}}
toasts.failedToPlayNextEpisode: Failed to play the next episode

errors.playbackTriggered: Playback error triggered. Please try again or switch stream type.

playback.compatibleCodecs: File video and audio codecs are compatible with this client. Direct play is recommended.
playback.incompatibleCodecs: File video and audio codecs are not compatible with this client. Transcoding is needed.
playback.preferTranscodingHelp: Enable 'Prefer transcoding' in the media streaming settings if you want to switch to transcoding

sync.title: Sync
sync.updateLocalDataDescription: Update your local snapshots with the data from AniList. This will overwrite your offline changes.
sync.uploadLocalChangesDescription: Update your AniList lists with the data from your local snapshots. This should be done after you've made changes offline.

offlineSync.title: Offline media

cloudRoom.autoJoinHelp: You will automatically join the room.
cloudRoom.createDescription: By continuing, you agree to broadcast your playback state through Seanime's servers to sync with peers while the room is active. You are limited to 10 rooms per day and 4 peers per room (subject to change).
cloudRoom.description: Cloud Rooms use Seanime's API to enable hosting watch parties without exposing your server to the internet.
cloudRoom.noLocalOrDebridPlayback: Cloud Rooms do not support local file and Debrid playback.
cloudRoom.title: Cloud Room

empty.configureInSettings: Configure Nakama in settings to connect to a host or start hosting

watchParty.activeJoinDescription: There's an active watch party! Join to watch content together in sync.
watchParty.connectToHost: Connect to a host to join a watch party
watchParty.title: Watch Party

server.connectionLostReconnecting: The server connection has been lost. Please wait while we attempt to reconnect.
server.relaunchIfPersists: If this message persists after multiple tries, please relaunch the application.
server.stoppedResponding: The background server process has stopped responding. Please restart it to continue.

update.notAvailableForDesktop: This update is not yet available for desktop clients. Wait a few minutes or check the GitHub page for more information.

active.title: Active torrents
active.description: See torrents currently being downloaded or seeded

stopSeedingAll.title: Stop seeding all torrents
stopSeedingAll.description: This action will cause seeding to stop for all completed torrents.

errors.clientConnectionDescription: Failed to connect to the torrent client, verify your settings and make sure it is running.

filters.title: Filters
filters.description: Filters are based on torrent names and can miss some results.

search.smartSearchHelp: Automated search based on given parameters.

warnings.adultContent: This provider does not support adult content
warnings.batchSearch: This provider does not support batch search
warnings.bestRelease: This provider does not support best release search
warnings.smartSearch: This provider does not support smart search

stream.title: Torrent streaming
stream.autoSelectFileHelp: The episode file will be automatically selected from your chosen batch torrent
stream.noMetadata: No metadata info available for this anime. You may need to manually select the file to stream.

errors.connectionDescription: Failed to connect to the Debrid service, verify your settings.
errors.notEnabledDescription: Debrid service is not enabled or configured

cancel.title: Cancel stream
cancel.description: Are you sure you want to cancel the stream?

cancelAndRemove.title: Cancel and remove torrent
cancelAndRemove.description: Are you sure you want to cancel the stream and remove the torrent?

modal.closeKeepsStream: Closing this modal will not cancel the stream

autoDownloader.title: Auto Downloader
autoDownloader.description: Automatically download new episodes as they are released.

createRules.title: Create new rules
createRules.description: Create multiple rules at once. Each rule will be created with the same parameters, except for the destination folder. By default, the episode type will be "Recent releases".

removeNoLongerAiring.title: Remove no longer airing media
removeNoLongerAiring.description: This action will remove all rules that no longer have media airing (finished). Are you sure you want to continue?

episodeTypes.recentHelp: New episodes you have not yet watched
episodeTypes.selectHelp: Only the specified episodes that aren't in your library

fields.additionalTermsHelp: Within each option, you can include variations separated by commas. (Case insensitive)
fields.additionalTermsLead: All options must be included for the torrent to be accepted.
fields.comparisonTitleHelp: Used for comparison purposes. When using 'Exact match', use a title most likely to be used in a torrent name.
fields.conditionHelp: Comma-separated case insensitive values or regex pattern
fields.conditionsHelp: Add conditions to filter torrents or adjust their score.
fields.delayHelp: Wait for better releases before downloading. The delay period will start once a first match is found. If a higher delay profile is assigned to a rule or applied globally, this one will be ignored.
fields.delayMinutesHelp: Wait this many minutes before downloading
fields.destinationHelp: Folder in your local library where the files will be saved
fields.episodeOffsetHelp: For example, if the release group starts numbering at 13 instead of 1, set this to 12.
fields.excludeTermsHelp: Torrents containing any of these terms will be rejected. (Case insensitive)
fields.excludeTermsLead: All options must be included for the torrent to be rejected.
fields.minimumScoreHelp: Torrents with a score lower than this will be rejected
fields.providersHelp: Select specific providers to look for. If empty, the default provider will be used.
fields.releaseGroupsHelp: List of release groups to look for. If empty, any release group will be accepted.
fields.releaseGroupsProfileHelp: List of release groups to look for. If empty, any release group will be accepted. Rules can override this.
fields.resolutionsHelp: List of resolutions to look for. If empty, the highest resolution will be accepted.
fields.resolutionsProfileHelp: Drag and drop to reorder. The first matching resolution will be picked. Rules can override this.
fields.skipDelayScoreHelp: Skip the delay if torrent score exceeds this value
fields.title: Title

profiles.applyHelp: Select a profile to apply shared filters. Local filters will override profile filters.
profiles.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete the profile "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
profiles.description: Profiles allow you to define a set of filters that can be applied to your rules.
profiles.globalHelp: Apply this profile to all rules automatically

queue.description: The queue shows items waiting to be downloaded or scanned.

rules.description: Rules allow you to programmatically download new episodes based on the parameters you set.
rules.mediaNotInLibrary: Media is not in your library
rules.noMediaFound: No media found in your library
rules.notInLibrary: This anime is not in your library

searchTypes.containsHelp: The torrent name must contain the comparison title you set (case insensitive)
searchTypes.likelyHelp: The torrent name will be parsed and analyzed using a comparison algorithm

settings.debridDisabledDescription: Debrid service is not enabled or configured. Please enable it in the settings.
settings.downloadImmediatelyHelp: If disabled, torrents will be added to the queue.
settings.intervalHelp: How often to check for new episodes.
settings.strictSeasonCheckHelp: If enabled, the torrents and media titles should contain the same season number. This can lead to false negatives.

simulation.checkLogs: Check the server logs for more details.

localAnimeLibrary.name: Local Anime Library
localAnimeLibrary.description: Display a complete grid of anime you have in your local library.

libraryUpcomingEpisodes.name: Upcoming Library Episodes
libraryUpcomingEpisodes.description: Display a carousel of upcoming episodes from anime you have in your library.

missedSequels.description: Display a carousel of sequels that aren't in your collection.

animeScheduleCalendar.description: Display a calendar of anime episodes based on their airing schedule.

localAnimeLibraryStats.description: Display the stats for your local anime library.
